# Pending Push 记录模板

当 commit 已经准备好，但 push 没成功时，使用这个模板。

## Summary

- branch:
- local HEAD:
- remote target:
- push command attempted:

## 等待推送的提交

1. commit hash - subject
2. commit hash - subject

## 失败详情

- failure time:
- error summary:
- probable cause:

## 任务记录更新

1. .artifacts/ai/task-plan.md changes made:
2. .artifacts/ai/progress.md changes made:
3. .artifacts/ai/findings.md changes made:
4. .artifacts/ai/handoff.md changes made if any:

## 下次推送动作

- exact command:
- prerequisite to fix first:
- safe resume point:
